params.description: Row highlights pulse to emphasize the 2 rows

steps.text: You're close. The first number tells us how many rows. Count the rows going across. How many rows do you see?

incorrects.description: Student selected 7 + 2, used addition instead of multiplication

steps.text: We use multiplication for rows of equal groups, not addition. The rows show 2 groups of 7. What operation shows groups of?

incorrects.description: Student selected 2 + 7, used addition instead of multiplication

params.description: Row highlights pulse to draw attention to the repeated groups

steps.text: Addition combines different amounts. Here we have 2 equal rows. When we have equal groups, we multiply. Which symbol shows multiplication?

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: First row pulses, then second row pulses. Text '2 rows' appears. Then '7 in each row' appears below.

steps.text: Let me show you. I count the rows. 1, 2. That's 2 rows. Each row has 7 dots. So we write 2 times 7. The answer is 2 × 7. That's what the rows show, 2 groups of 7.
